coalitions: US-led rules-based coalition (USA, PHL, VNM, JPN, IND) condemning the ADIZ
ASEAN unity bloc (PHL, VNM, MYS, BRN, IDN) refusing to legitimize the ten-dashed line
note: China's surprise ADIZ declaration mid-talks hardened every other delegation's resolve, letting the US-led coalition seize momentum but pushing the table past the point where any sovereignty compromise was possible, so talks stalled without agreement.
